🧬 SKZ PEPTIDES

Research Protocol: Retatrutide 5mg

🧬 Retatrutide 5mg Research Protocol

📋 Product Information

  • Product: SKZ Peptides Retatrutide 5mg
  • Purity: ≥99%
  • Form: Lyophilized powder
  • Storage: 2-8°C refrigerated

🔬 Reconstitution Protocol

Materials Needed:

  • 1x Retatrutide 5mg vial
  • 2-3mL Bacteriostatic Water (BAC Water)
  • Insulin syringes (29G-31G)
  • Alcohol swabs
  • Sterile work environment

Step-by-Step Process:

  1. Preparation
    • Wash hands thoroughly
    • Clean work surface with alcohol
    • Allow vials to reach room temperature (10-15 minutes)
  2. Reconstitution
    • Clean vial tops with alcohol swabs
    • Draw 2mL BAC Water into syringe
    • Inject BAC Water slowly down the side of vial (avoid direct contact with powder)
    • Gently swirl (do NOT shake vigorously)
    • Allow to dissolve completely (2-3 minutes)
  3. Final Concentration
    • 5mg in 2mL = 2.5mg/mL (2500mcg/mL)
    • Each 0.1mL contains 250mcg
    • Each 0.2mL contains 500mcg

📊 Research Dosing Guidelines

Level Week 1-2 Week 3-4 Week 5-8 Frequency
Beginner 0.25mg (0.1mL) 0.5mg (0.2mL) 0.75mg (0.3mL) Once weekly
Intermediate 0.5mg (0.2mL) 1.0mg (0.4mL) 1.5mg (0.6mL) Once weekly
Advanced 1.0-2.5mg weekly (maintenance) Once weekly

⏰ Administration Schedule

Timing:

  • Best time: Morning, fasted state
  • Frequency: Once weekly, same day each week
  • Duration: 12-16 week research cycles

Injection Sites:

  • Subcutaneous administration
  • Preferred sites: Lower abdomen, thigh
  • Rotate injection sites to prevent tissue irritation
  • Depth: 4-6mm subcutaneous

🔍 Research Monitoring

Weekly Measurements:

  • Body weight
  • Body composition (if available)
  • Energy levels (1-10 scale)
  • Appetite changes
  • Sleep quality

Monthly Assessments:

  • Progress photos
  • Circumference measurements
  • Blood glucose (if monitoring)
  • Overall well-being assessment

⚠️ Important Considerations

Contraindications:

  • Not suitable for subjects under 18
  • Pregnancy/breastfeeding
  • Active eating disorders
  • Severe gastrointestinal conditions

Potential Research Observations:

  • Reduced appetite
  • Mild nausea (first 1-2 weeks)
  • Delayed gastric emptying
  • Improved glucose tolerance

📚 Storage & Handling

Powder (Unreconstituted):

  • Store at 2-8°C (refrigerator)
  • Protect from light
  • Shelf life: 2+ years when properly stored

Reconstituted Solution:

  • Store at 2-8°C (refrigerator)
  • Use within 28 days
  • Protect from light
  • Do not freeze

💡 Pro Research Tips

  1. Start Low, Go Slow - Begin with minimum effective dose and increase gradually
  2. Optimize Timing - Morning injection in fasted state preferred
  3. Support Research - Maintain consistent nutrition and exercise
  4. Documentation - Keep detailed research log with all observations

🔬 Research Background

Retatrutide is a triple agonist peptide targeting GLP-1, GIP, and glucagon receptors. It works by slowing gastric emptying, reducing food intake, improving glucose homeostasis, and promoting fat oxidation.

⚠️ DISCLAIMER

This protocol is for research purposes only. Not intended for human consumption. Consult qualified professionals for research guidance. SKZ Peptides provides research materials only.
